---
title: "tanking"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(hoopR)
library(rvest)
library(janitor)
library(chromote)
library(jsonlite)
library(httr2)
library(quantreg)
library(lme4)
```

```{r}
games <- load_nba_team_box(seasons = 2019:2026) |> 
  mutate(win = ifelse(team_winner, 1, 0),
         month = month(game_date),
         late_season = ifelse(month >= 3, 1, 0)
  )

early_team_perf <- games %>%
  filter(month < 3) %>%
  group_by(team_abbreviation, season) %>%
  summarise(
    early_games = n(),
    early_wins = sum(win, na.rm = TRUE),
    early_win_pct = mean(win, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

team_late_perf <- games %>%
  filter(month >= 3) %>%
  group_by(team_abbreviation, season) %>%
  summarise(
    late_games = n(),
    late_wins = sum(win, na.rm = TRUE),
    late_win_pct = mean(win, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

```{r}
get_draft <- function(year) {
  url <- paste0("https://www.basketball-reference.com/draft/NBA_", year, ".html")
  page <- read_html(url)
  table <- page |> 
    html_node("table#stats") |> 
    html_table() |>
    row_to_names(row_number = 1) |> 
    clean_names() |> 
    mutate(
    pk = as.numeric(pk),
    g = as.numeric(g),
    mp = as.numeric(mp),
    pts = as.numeric(pts),
    ws = as.numeric(ws)
  ) |> 
    filter(!is.na(pk))
  
  table$draft_year <- year
  return(table)
}

draft_data <- map_dfr(2019:2025, get_draft)
```

```{r}
b <- ChromoteSession$new()

b$Page$navigate("https://craftednba.com/draft/class-rankings")
Sys.sleep(5)

page_text <- b$Runtime$evaluate(
  "document.body.innerText"
)$result$value

cat(page_text)

lines <- str_split(page_text, "\n")[[1]]

clean_lines <- lines %>%
  str_trim() %>%
  discard(~ .x == "") %>%
  keep(~ str_detect(.x, "Draft|prospects analyzed|^[0-9]+\\.?[0-9]*$"))

draft_table <- tibble(line = clean_lines) %>%
  mutate(group = cumsum(str_detect(line, "20[0-9]{2} Draft"))) %>%
  filter(group > 0) %>%
  group_by(group) %>%
  summarise(
    draft_year = as.numeric(str_extract(line[str_detect(line, "Draft")], "20[0-9]{2}")),
    prospects_analyzed = as.numeric(str_extract(line[str_detect(line, "prospects analyzed")], "^[0-9]+")),
    avg_rating = as.numeric(line[which(str_detect(line, "Draft")) + 2]),
    elite_count = as.numeric(line[which(str_detect(line, "Draft")) + 3]),
    above_avg_count = as.numeric(line[which(str_detect(line, "Draft")) + 4]),
    top_prospect_rating = as.numeric(line[which(str_detect(line, "Draft")) + 5]),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

```{r}
draft_strength <- draft_table %>%
  transmute(
    draft_year,
    avg_rating,
    elite_count,
    above_avg_count,
    top_prospect_rating
  )
draft_strength_2019_present <- draft_strength %>%
  filter(draft_year >= 2019)

team_data <- team_late_perf %>%
  left_join(early_team_perf, by = c("team_abbreviation", "season")) %>%
  mutate(
    draft_year = season + 1,
    win_pct_change = late_win_pct - early_win_pct,
    non_contender = ifelse(early_win_pct < 0.400, 1, 0)
  ) %>%
  left_join(draft_strength_2019_present, by = "draft_year")
```

```{r}
non_con <- team_data |> 
  filter(non_contender == 1) |> 
  mutate(tanking = ifelse(win_pct_change < -0.10 & non_contender == 1, 1, 0))

model1 <- lm(win_pct_change ~ avg_rating, data = non_con)
summary(model1)

model3 <- glm(
  tanking ~ top_prospect_rating,
  data = non_con,
  family = "binomial"
)

summary(model3)

model_mixed2 <- lmer(
  win_pct_change ~ avg_rating +
    (1 | team_abbreviation) +
    (1 | season),
  data = team_data
)

summary(model_mixed2)
```
